title: Barber Open Now in National City, CA | Walk-Ins, Hours & Booking
description: Looking for a barber open now in National City, CA? Royal Fern Barber Studio offers walk-ins, booking, clear hours, and easy arrival details including Studio #116 at Plaza Bonita Road.

faqSchema.question: Do you take walk-ins at Royal Fern Barber Studio?
faqSchema.answer: Royal Fern Barber Studio serves both walk-in and booking intent. Clients who want the most predictable timing should book ahead, while walk-in interest is still part of the page intent.

faqSchema.question: What are your business hours?
faqSchema.answer: Current listed hours are 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM Monday through Sunday.

faqSchema.question: How do I find the studio once I arrive?
faqSchema.answer: Royal Fern Barber Studio is located at 3030 Plaza Bonita Road Unit #1336, National City, CA 91950, Studio #116.

faqSchema.question: What is the best option if I need a fade or beard service at a specific time?
faqSchema.answer: If timing matters, booking ahead is the stronger choice because it gives clients a cleaner arrival window than relying on walk-in flow.
